headline: The Healthcare Stock Built for Investors Who Prioritize Capital Preservation
summary: This company collects a lot of recurring revenue -- and pays a growing dividend.

headline: RBC Trims Becton Dickinson (BDX) Outlook despite Stable MedTech Demand
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) is included among the 10 Healthcare Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 14, RBC Capital lowered its price recommendation on Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) to $175 from $195. It maintained a Sector Perform rating on the shares. The update came as part of a broader Q1 preview for MedTech […]

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on Becton Dickinson, Lowers Price Target to $159
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Jason Bednar   maintains Becton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $170 to $159.
